backend.choice_reason: uv was unavailable in preflight, while conda provided an isolated Python 3.10 path that successfully executed the repo-native Transformers workflow.

import.test: from transformers import Qwen2VLForConditionalGeneration, AutoProcessor; from qwen_vl_utils import process_vision_info
import.evidence: Import succeeded inside /tmp/sure_eval_qwen2_vl_2b_instruct/env with transformers 4.57.6 and qwen-vl-utils 0.0.14.

load.evidence: Load completed on device mps:0 after fetching the checkpoint into /tmp/sure_eval_qwen2_vl_2b_instruct/hf_home.

infer.test: Single-image prompt using tests/fixtures/shared/vlm/demo_image.jpg and processor.apply_chat_template + process_vision_info + model.generate
infer.evidence: The approved-network infer run returned a non-empty description of the local fixture image.

contract.evidence: runtime_output.json contains a JSON object with a non-empty text field.

notes: The sandbox could not resolve external hosts by default, so controlled network approval was required for reachability checks, dependency installation, weight download, and the final infer run.
The host has no CUDA device, but Transformers placed the model on mps:0 and the phase-1 target succeeded there.
A deterministic shared VLM fixture was created locally because the repository did not contain any existing image fixtures.
A post-contract wrapper smoke test confirmed that the generated model-local wrapper reuses the validated repo-native path.
